prompt: A highly detailed realistic photo of the back side of a Pakistani decorated truck on a highway road in daylight. The truck is painted in bright turquoise blue with traditional Pakistani truck art floral borders in orange, yellow, and red. On the back panel there is a large hand-painted portrait of a man with long wavy hair and glasses, painted in a realistic illustration style. Above the portrait, bold 3D truck-art text reads “TU JA RE...” in white and orange. Below the portrait, small boxed text reads “SIDE SE JA RE”. The truck has yellow license plates that say “JAMAILA” on both sides. The background shows an empty road with electric poles and a blurred rural landscape. Cinematic composition, centered truck rear view, ultra sharp, vibrant colors, 4K, realistic truck art style, professional photography lighting.
